story.iWant: **a system tray icon with quick actions and connection status indicators**
story.soThat: **I can quickly access the application, monitor connection status at a glance, and perform common actions without opening the main window**.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: **AC-2.1**: System tray icon displays in platform tray with three status states (connected: green, disconnected: gray, syncing: blue)
**AC-2.2**: Tray icon tooltip shows connection status and unread notification count
**AC-2.3**: Tray menu includes Show/Hide Window, New Thread, Settings, Quit actions
**AC-2.4**: Double-clicking tray icon shows/hides main window
**AC-2.5**: macOS tray icon uses Template image format for automatic dark mode support

constraints.constraint: IPC communication patterns between main and renderer processes

ideas.idea: Test: **AC-2.1**: System tray icon displays in platform tray with three status states ...

Test: **AC-2.4**: Double-clicking tray icon shows/hides main window...
Test: **AC-2.5**: macOS tray icon uses Template image format for automatic dark mode s...
